summary: Processes verified Stripe webhook events into latest CockroachDB billing state.
responsibilities: Ignore unrelated Stripe event types after minimal receipt tracking.
Upsert latest Stripe customer and subscription objects.
Use Stripe event ids for idempotent webhook processing.
invariants: Webhook signature verification must happen before this module receives event data.
Raw webhook bodies, Stripe secrets, and payment method details must not be stored.
Only active or trialing subscriptions may make the dashboard status paid.
